narrative:
Darbyville/Muhlenberg (precinct in Pickaway County) has 623 registered voters, with 51.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.4 percentage points.
